Localization.Description: An attempt to load data from external resources using the built-in utility certutil. Certutil can be used to obtain information about a certificate authority and configure certificate services.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} using the built-in utility certutil downloaded {object.name} from external resource {dst.host} to host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attempted to load data from external resources using the built-in utility certutil
